creator: junya@on.rim.or.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port for manupulationg MSDOS files.

	1. It supprt reading/writing 1232KB formatted floopy on FreeBSD(98).
	2. It can print SJIS Short File Name and Unicode Long File Name files.

	It makes from mtools-3.6 with patch.
	This patch to make by kogane@kces.koganemaru.co.jp.

	I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

	Packed tarball is

	MD5 (ja-mtools-3.6.tar.gz) = ea9b90047ffe482ccfc5b1e078d61270
